title: bidens negriana
intro: Bidens negriana, also known as the sticky joepy or biddens negriana, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Bidens negriana has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant's leaves and flowers are commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
